properties.description: Data Flow iDocs Project Specific Raw to Synapse

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{PROJECT NO.} as string,
		{PROJECT ID} as string,
		{PROJECT NAME} as string,
		{CLIENT NAME} as string,
		DELIVERABLE as string,
		{DOC ID} as string,
		{TYPE CLASS} as string,
		{DOCUMENT NUMBER} as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_01 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_02 as float '###,###.##',
		PROJ_DEFINED_03 as float '###,###.##',
		PROJ_DEFINED_04 as float '###,###.##',
		PROJ_DEFINED_05 as float '###,###.##',
		PROJ_DEFINED_06 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_07 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_08 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_09 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_10 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_11 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_12 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_13 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_14 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_15 as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/iDocs/Project_Specific/Latest_iDocs_Project_Specific.csv']) ~> srciDocsProjectSpecificRaw
srciDocsProjectSpecificRaw derive({PROJECT NO.} = iif(length(regexSplit({PROJECT NO.},'[-]')[1])>5,concat('99',regexSplit({PROJECT NO.},'[-]')[1]),regexSplit({PROJECT NO.},'[-]')[1]),
		each(match((in(['PROJ_DEFINED_02','PROJ_DEFINED_03','PROJ_DEFINED_04','PROJ_DEFINED_05'],name))), $$ = toDecimal($$, 8, 4))) ~> iDocsProjectSepcificDataTransform
iDocsProjectSepcificDataTransform sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		stage_idoc_proj_spec_id as integer,
		PROJECT_NUMBER as string,
		PROJECT_ID as string,
		PROJECT_NAME as string,
		CLIENT_NAME as string,
		DELIVERABLE as string,
		DOC_ID as string,
		TYPE_CLASS as string,
		DOCUMENT_NUMBER as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_01 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_02 as double,
		PROJ_DEFINED_03 as double,
		PROJ_DEFINED_04 as double,
		PROJ_DEFINED_05 as double,
		PROJ_DEFINED_06 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_07 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_08 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_09 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_10 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_11 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_12 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_13 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_14 as string,
		PROJ_DEFINED_15 as string
	),
	deletable:false,
	insertable:true,
	updateable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	truncate:true,
	format: 'table',
	staged: true,
	allowCopyCommand: true,
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError',
	mapColumn(
		PROJECT_NUMBER = {PROJECT NO.},
		PROJECT_ID = {PROJECT ID},
		PROJECT_NAME = {PROJECT NAME},
		CLIENT_NAME = {CLIENT NAME},
		DELIVERABLE,
		DOC_ID = {DOC ID},
		TYPE_CLASS = {TYPE CLASS},
		DOCUMENT_NUMBER = {DOCUMENT NUMBER},
		PROJ_DEFINED_01,
		PROJ_DEFINED_02,
		PROJ_DEFINED_03,
		PROJ_DEFINED_04,
		PROJ_DEFINED_05,
		PROJ_DEFINED_06,
		PROJ_DEFINED_07,
		PROJ_DEFINED_08,
		PROJ_DEFINED_09,
		PROJ_DEFINED_10,
		PROJ_DEFINED_11,
		PROJ_DEFINED_12,
		PROJ_DEFINED_13,
		PROJ_DEFINED_14,
		PROJ_DEFINED_15
	)) ~> snkiDocsProjectSpecificSynapse
